entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Cereal crop [Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br.] valued for grain and stover in arid and semiarid regions

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: Geographic region where pearl millet is an important cereal crop

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Geographic region where pearl millet is an important cereal crop and source of elite composites

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, a key productivity trait

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The amount of vegetative biomass produced per unit area

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A common production constraint in arid and semiarid regions

entities.name: LANDRACES
entities.description: Drought-resilient local varieties of pearl millet grown in Indian regions

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The overall output of the crop, including grain and biomass

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a cultivar to maintain productivity under drought stress

entities.name: ARID ZONE
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by low rainfall and drought-prone nature

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: The process of crossing Indian landraces with African elite composites to improve traits

entities.name: ELITE COMPOSITES
entities.description: High-performing composite varieties of pearl millet from Africa

entities.name: JODHPUR
entities.description: The specific location in India where the hybridization study was evaluated

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted and Indian landraces were sourced

entities.name: MIDPARENT HETEROSIS
entities.description: A method used to quantify the improvement in crosses relative to the average of their parents

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total biological mass of the plant, which was improved through hybridization

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total biomass

entities.name: TOTAL CROP VALUE
entities.description: The combined productivity value of grain and stover yields
